hero.name: Professor Yusupjon Pulatovich Apakov
hero.bio1: Doctor of Physical and Mathematical Sciences (DSc), Professor Yusupjon Pulatovich Apakov is one of the prominent scientists who has been actively working in the field of partial differential equations.
hero.bio2: Yu.P. Apakov was born on January 2, 1956, in Hazratishoh village, Chortoq district, Namangan region.
hero.bio3: In 2016, he successfully defended his doctoral dissertation at the National University of Uzbekistan and received the scientific degree of Doctor of Physical and Mathematical Sciences.

image.department: Professor of the Department of Higher Mathematics

career.title: Academic Career
career.item1: In 1979–1980, he taught mathematics at secondary school No. 37 in Hazratishoh village.
career.item2: In 1991–2003, he worked as an associate professor at the Department of Higher Mathematics at Namangan Industrial Technology Institute.
career.item3: In 2003–2005, he served as the head of the Department of Higher Mathematics.
career.item4: In 2017–2022, he worked as acting professor at the Department of Higher Mathematics at Namangan Engineering and Construction Institute.
career.item5: Since 2025, he has been working as a professor at the Department of Higher Mathematics at Namangan State Technical University.

research.title: Scientific Research
research.item1: Boundary value problems for differential equations of mixed parabolic-hyperbolic type have been studied
research.item2: Fundamental solutions for third-order equations with multiple characteristics have been constructed
research.item3: Green's functions for higher-order equations have been developed
research.item4: Theoretical foundations for applying the Fourier method to odd-order equations have been created

publications.title: Books and Publications
publications.book2: Examples and Problems in Higher Mathematics – 2022
publications.book3: Examples and Problems in Ordinary Differential Equations – 2009
publications.book4: On the Theory of Third-Order Equations – 2019
publications.book5: Boundary Value Problems of Mixed Type – 2023
publications.note: Professor Apakov is the author of more than 270 scientific articles, more than 50 of which are indexed in Scopus and Web of Science databases.

awards.title: Awards
awards.item1: Honorary Worker Badge of the II degree – 2023
awards.item2: Certificate of Honor from the Minister of Higher and Secondary Special Education – 2022, 2025
awards.item3: Certificate of Appreciation from the Republican Center for Spirituality and Enlightenment – 2022
